title: iris lactea var. chinensis
intro: Iris lactea var. chinensis, also known as the white iris or Chinese iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family (Iridaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Iris lactea var. chinensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
